spec_natural_language: function borrow MUST revert when the contract is paused

violated_invariant.expected_behavior: borrow should revert when called on a paused contract

extraction_reasoning: The finding explicitly identifies the missing whenNotPaused modifier on the borrow function at line 256. The invariant is clearly stated: borrow should not be callable when the contract is paused, matching the behavior of deposit and withdraw functions which have whenNotPaused modifiers. The recommended fix is also explicit.
